title: Read File
description: Read a bounded slice from a local text file by path. Returns file metadata, optional line-numbered content, truncation state, and the next line to request when more content remains.

selection.summary: Read known local text files safely in line-bounded chunks.
selection.whenToUse: Use when the user asks about a local file path or you need to inspect source/config text that already has a known path.
selection.whenNotToUse: Do not use for directory discovery, file editing, binary files, or web pages.
